candidate_lesson: A trade requiring a 56-day hold to realize its edge should be vetoed when 4 of 6 signal layers are ✗ — the macro thesis cannot survive that many days of contradicting price structure.
testable_rule: if entry_context['hold_days_est'] > 30 and sum(1 for layer in signal_layers_active if layer.startswith('✓')) < 3: return ForexVeto  # long-horizon macro needs structural confirmation now
